acceptance_checks.verify_method: yq eval + eidolons mcp show atomos

acceptance_checks.given: the recorded releases 0.2.0 digest read back OUT OF THE FILE
acceptance_checks.then: it byte-equals the multi-arch INDEX digest for ghcr.io/rynaro/atomos:0.2.0 (never a per-arch manifest digest, never copied from a release note)
acceptance_checks.verify_method: docker buildx imagetools inspect --format Manifest.Digest compared to the value parsed from roster/mcps.yaml

acceptance_checks.when: compared to tools/list served by the pinned digest itself
acceptance_checks.then: it contains exactly the four mcp__atomos__* names including compose_externalize_manifest
acceptance_checks.verify_method: stdio MCP tools/list against the pinned ghcr digest

acceptance_checks.then: 0.1.0 is retained and reachable via eidolons mcp use atomos@0.1.0
no NEW red relative to a clean tree (doctor_deep DD-7 is a confirmed pre-existing failure)
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats cli/tests/ with a stash-and-rerun control on DD-7

acceptance_checks.then: .mcp.json and .gitignore are NOT included (local consumer artefacts carrying machine-absolute paths)
